title: I added a Monday doc column to my template and now it can't be saved
excerpt:
I tried to create a Monday doc in a board, and couldn’t save it as a template or access it from anywhere else. So I created it at workspace level and saved it as a template. 
I want to add a Monday doc column to a differ…

posts.author: KTM (Karen Maddock)
posts.cookedHtml:
I tried to create a Monday doc in a board, and couldn’t save it as a template or access it from anywhere else. So I created it at workspace level and saved it as a template.

I want to add a Monday doc column to a different template I have. So I added the column, and also edited the Settings so that any new doc created in that column follows that template. But when I tried to save/publish the board template, I got the error ‘This workspace contains private or shared workspace components, such as boards or dashboards’. So I deleted the Monday doc column completely, refreshed the board, and still no luck

  1. Have I now sullied my board template such that any future edits can’t be saved?!
  2. I still want to have a Monday doc column based on the doc template. Can I do that?

Thank you!

Karen

posts.author: danielmonday (Daniel Storm)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same issue. My workspace template within the template center won’t save anymore. I’m not sure though what the root cause is as I could save it every time before.
The only thing I changed are the permissions to allow only board owners to edit.
I reverted this change though and it still doesn’t save the template anymore

any solution?
